name: Avgolemono
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring chicken stock to a boil in a large pot.
2. Add rice and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
3. Remove from heat.
4. Beat egg whites until stiff.
5. Add the egg yolks and beat well.
6. Slowly add lemon juice to eggs, beating constantly.
7. Slowly add 2 cups of hot chicken stock, beating continuously until well mixed.
8. Pour the egg mixture into the remaining chicken stock, stirring well.
9. Heat gently, but do not allow to boil.
10. Serve garnished with lemon slices.
